facebook.caption: POV: you drove past the resort strip, followed a side road into Ông Lang, and found Gecko's Phuquoc. 4.7 stars across 420 reviews. Family-run. The kind of place that doesn't need a billboard. Dinh Bà is not where most tourists end up. That's the point. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Side road. No sign. Then this. Gecko's Phuquoc in Ông Lang is sitting on 4.7 stars and 420 reviews for a reason. Worth the detour.

instagram.caption: Took a wrong turn into Ông Lang. Found Gecko's Phuquoc. 4.7★, 420 reviews, zero hype. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Ditched the tourist strip. Ended up at Gecko's Phuquoc. 4.7 stars doesn't lie.

tiktok.caption: Wrong turn. Best meal. Gecko's Phuquoc in Ông Lang hits 4.7★ with 420 reviews. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocFood #VietnamTravel
